features.name: Implement is_ready tool — GET /health, returns {ready, port, timestamp}
Implement get_status tool — GET /api/status, returns session/tab info
Implement navigate tool — POST /api/navigate with videoUrl (must be /video/ format)
Implement post tool — POST /api/comment with videoUrl+text, dryRun support
Implement search tool — GET /api/search with keyword/limit params
Implement like tool — POST /api/like/:videoId with dryRun support
Structured error handling: RATE_LIMITED, SESSION_EXPIRED, SERVICE_DOWN codes
Register server on stdio transport + export for MCP client consumption
